stories.headline: Live updates: Iranian strikes hit Lebanon and Saudi Arabia as US and Israel target nuclear facilities
stories.description: Iran strikes Lebanon, Saudi; US & Israel retaliate with airstrikes.

stories.headline: When is the Spring Statement and what might be in it?
stories.description: Reeves to update UK economic plans with forecast on March 3.

stories.headline: Why did US and Israel attack Iran and how long could the war last?
stories.description: Iran has carried out strikes against Israel, across the Gulf and against a British base in Cyprus in retaliation.

stories.headline: Israel strikes Lebanon’s Beirut again; Hezbollah launches drones at Israel
stories.description: The Israeli army says it is striking Hezbollah targets as its raids cause mass displacement in Lebanon.

stories.headline: Starmer at odds with Trump in biggest disagreement yet
stories.description: The prime minister told MPs that the government "does not believe in regime change from the skies".
